name: @elizaos-plugins/plugin-google-chat
description: Google Chat integration plugin for elizaOS agents

scripts.build: npm run build:typescript && npm run build:python && npm run build:rust
scripts.build:python: test -n "$SKIP_PYTHON_BUILD" && echo 'Python build skipped (SKIP_PYTHON_BUILD set)' || (test -d python && cd python && timeout 120 pip install -e . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python build skipped or timed out')
scripts.test: npm run test:typescript && npm run test:python && npm run test:rust
scripts.lint: npm run lint:typescript && npm run lint:python && npm run lint:rust

author: elizaOS

GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT.description: Service account JSON string for Google Chat authentication

GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE.description: Path to service account JSON file

GOOGLE_CHAT_AUDIENCE_TYPE.description: Type of audience verification (app-url or project-number)

GOOGLE_CHAT_SPACES.description: Comma-separated list of spaces to auto-join

GOOGLE_CHAT_REQUIRE_MENTION.description: Whether to require @mention in group spaces

GOOGLE_CHAT_ENABLED.description: Enable or disable the Google Chat plugin
